prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve already done the hardest part—you showed up. Now all that’s left is one decisive move: start. Not perfect, not pretty—just start. The task isn’t a mountain; it’s a pile of minutes, and you’ve got the next one. Use it. Momentum is born in the first five seconds, not the fifth hour. Punch the clock on procrastination and let the rest chase you. Go—future-you is already grateful.
